snippet.title: Baarish Ki Jaaye | B Praak Ft Nawazuddin Siddiqui & Sunanda Sharma | Jaani | Arvindr Khaira | DM

The Nawazuddin Siddiqui and Sunandha Sharma is all set to take you all to there Dream world. The song is based on true story .

Sach vi supna jeha 
Lagda ae... 
Aaj menu London vi Jalandar jeha 
Lagda ae..

snippet.title: Kutty Pattas Music Video | Ashwin | Reba John | Venki | Santhosh Dhayanidhi | Sandy
snippet.description:
A brilliantly vivid splash of colours and a wildly fun #KuttyPattas composed by the Raati fame #SanthoshDhayanidhi featuring the most exciting cast one could ask for! Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Watch it here and bring out the moves ! 

Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/KuttyPattas

Song - Kutty Pattas
Composed by - Santhosh Dhayanidhi
Featuring - Ashwin Kumar, Reba Monica John
Sung by - Santhosh Dhayanidhi, Rakshita Suresh
Lyrics - A.Pa Raja
Directed by - Venki
Cinematography - Harish Kannan
Choreography - Sandy Master
Set - Amaran
Editing - Krishna Kumar
DI - Suresh Ravi
Costumes - Sathya NJ
Stills - Kiransa Photography

Lyrics Of Song Kismat Teri By Inder Chahal

Pta ni smjhda a Ki khud Nu
Easy Lai Na Rab Kolo Dar Mundea
Mai Tenu Puchea A Han Kar Tu
Naale Sgo Shukar V Kar Mundea
Zehar Khaavei Koi Menu Fark Nahi
Rendi. A Fikar Ki Tu Roti Khaa Lai
A Tan Kismat Teri Kam Kargi Jatta
Enni Sohni Kuri Jo Tu Piche La Lai

Firdi A Time Tera Chak Di Kuri
Lokan De Tan Jehri Phone V Ni Chakdi
Khaure Kdo Milan Lai Puch Lve Tu
Jyada Tar Time Free Rakhdi
Tere Ik Reply Di V Wait Kardi
Naale Wait Karn Nu Bda Hate Kardi
J Mai Chahundi Kise Nu. V Date Kardi
Enni Aam Hai Ni Jinni Tu Bnaa Lai
A Tan Kismat Teri Kam Kargi Jatta
Enni Sohni Kuri Jo Tu Piche La Lai

Unj Mera Naram Subah Mundea 
J Koi bole Tenu Menu Gussa Chad da
Mai Firdi Lokan De Avein Gle Fad Di Tu Jatta Mera Hath V Ni Fad Da
Haan Kise Din Karde Kamaal Mundea 
Mai Baithi Hova Kuria De Naal Mundea
Meri Baah Fadke Tu Laijein Naal Mundea
Babbu Keho Jia Gallan Tu Karan La Lai
A Tan Kismat Teri Kam Kargi Jatta
Enni Sohni Kuri Jo Tu Piche La Lai

snippet.title: Suez Canal | How will Blocked Ship get out? | Dhruv Rathee
snippet.description:
In the 150 year history of Suez Canal, it is the first time that a blockade like this has happened. Why did the Ever Given ship get stuck in the Suez Canal and what is being done to take it out? I explain all this in this video and the importance of Suez and Panama canals in the global trade today. I also explain why ship traffic is stuck behind the Suez Canal and they have a dilemma. Should they wait it out or should they take the route through the Cape of Good hope in South Africa. 

Support my work and join as a member to get exclusive stuff:
1. On Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/dhruvrathee
2. On Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-CS...

           || Lyrics ||                       
Kaatal adaavan kudi gun wargi..
Kardi glow firre chann wargi..
Kaatal adaavan kudi gun wargi
Oye Kardi glow firre chann wargi
Hona ae halaak ajj Road Romeo.. (2)
Tenu takk takk ke jo Race maardai..
‚ÄúKalla hi ni maan c palazzo sohniyei ni jhanjheran na duggni grace maardai,,
Pehlan hi ni maan c palazzo sohniyei  ni jhanjheran na duggni grace maardai‚Äù

Vaal chadde hoye ne loose paya suit tang ni.. 
Gajre tere da tere jeha rang ni.. (2)
Sone te suhaga nakhre te sang ni..
Krda ae kill tera ang ang ni.. 
Thukk teri sohniye donali wargi..
Rohb tera raund jinni thes maardai..
Kalla hi maan c palazzo...

Ho Gaaneyan di list Banayi firdi..
Hathan utte mehndi kudi laaayi firdi.. 
Tikka forehead te sajayi firdi..
Nazran churaundi firre bde chirr di..
Mere sun di aa gaane kal di repeat te
Sune Shivjot kal di repeat te..
O kudi pa ke palazzo nache..
Pa ke palazzo nache desi beat te..
Pa ke Sharara nache Desi beat te
O pa ke palazzo nache desi beat te..

Gore mukh utte aenkan ne kaliyan..
Golden kanna vich payiyan Waliyan.. (2)
Jutti tilledar kade heelan pa liyan..
Ni Munde ki tu kudiyan v piche la liyan..
Gaave jdo Billa Nachdi ae duniya..
litteran wale da dhol base maardai..
Kalla hi ni maan c palazzo sohniyei ni jhanjhera na duggni grace maardai..
Ho kalla hi ni maan c palazzo sohniyei ni Jhanjeran na duggni grace maardai... (2)

snippet.description:
#DahiVadaByKabita #HoliSoecialRecipe #KabitasKitchen

Ingredients:
For Vada :
Moong dal (soaked) - 1 cup
Urad dal (soaked)- 1/2 cup
Ginger -2 inch
Green chilli-1
Coriander leaves 
Salt 
Asafoetida -1/4 tsp 
Cooking oil to fry

For Green chutney :
Mint leaves - 1/4 cup
Garlic cloves - 4
Green chillies - 2
Coriander leaves -1/4 cup
Salt to taste

For tamarind chutney:
Tamarind pulp- 1/2 cup
Red chilli powder -1 tsp
Sugar- 2 tbsp
Salt - 1 tsp
water

For Dahi Vada Decoration :
Curd - 1 cup
Salt - 1/2 tsp
Sugar - 1 tsp
Water - 1/4 cup
Cumin powder
Salt
Chat masala
Green chutney
Tamarind chutney
Red chilli
coriander leaves

Born in a small village in Neeleswaram in Kasaragod district, Abhirami Ashok Yadav or Aami Ashokan is a YouTuber and Influencer. Aami's family has been struggling financially. Aami's father was a perfect alcoholic and used to beat up her mother almost all the days. Seeing this every day, Aami Ashokan longed for a better tomorrow. Aami's family was devastated by her father's untimely death. Aami Ashokan's marriage comes at a time when she's going through a difficult time with her mentally exhausted mother and unemployed brother. But then Aami had to get a divorce from that marriage. But the locals around her started calling names by that time. Aami Ashokan kept getting bad comments while making and posting videos on Tik-Tok. But despite that, she continued to work hard. Aami's videos were later uploaded to YouTube and the audience started liking her. Although there are still people who comment very badly on her personal life, Aami Ashokan is an influencer and YouTuber who earns over a lakh rupees today. Today's Aami's life is the good days she dreamed of then.

If you found this episode of Josh Talks Malayalam helpful, please like and share it immediately; Let us know your comments via the comment box. What are your dreams for a better tomorrow? Share with Josh Talks Malayalam.

Watch Aami Ashokan's YouTube channel here:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCi1oMmvSnRvQQxybv9nLxiQ


Josh Talks passionately believes that a well-told story has the power to reshape attitudes, lives, and ultimately, the world. We are on a mission to find and showcase the best motivational stories from across India through documented videos and live events held all over the country. Josh Talks Malayalam caters to the Malayalam speaking audience worldwide. It aims to inspire and motivate Malayalees by showcasing Malayalam motivation through the experiences of fellow Malayalis. Josh talks Malayalam brings to you the best Malayalam motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women‚Äôs rights, public policy, sports, entertainment, and social initiatives. With 9 languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the setbacks they face in their career and helping them discover their true calling in life.

Born in a small village in Neeleswaram in Kasaragod district, Abhirami Ashok Yadav or Aami Ashokan is a YouTuber and Influencer. Aami's family has been struggling financially. Aami's father was a perfect alcoholic and used to beat up her mother almost all the days. Seeing this every day, Aami Ashokan longed for a better tomorrow. Aami's family was devastated by her father's untimely death. Aami Ashokan's marriage comes at a time when she's going through a difficult time with her mentally exhausted mother and unemployed brother. But then Aami had to get a divorce from that marriage. But the locals around her started calling names by that time. Aami Ashokan kept getting bad comments while making and posting videos on Tik-Tok. But despite that, she continued to work hard. Aami's videos were later uploaded to YouTube and the audience started liking her. Although there are still people who comment very badly on her personal life, Aami Ashokan is an influencer and YouTuber who earns over a lakh rupees today. Today's Aami's life is the good days she dreamed of then.

If you found this episode of Josh Talks Malayalam helpful, please like and share it immediately; Let us know your comments via the comment box. What are your dreams for a better tomorrow? Share with Josh Talks Malayalam.

Watch Aami Ashokan's YouTube channel here:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCi1oMmvSnRvQQxybv9nLxiQ


Josh Talks passionately believes that a well-told story has the power to reshape attitudes, lives, and ultimately, the world. We are on a mission to find and showcase the best motivational stories from across India through documented videos and live events held all over the country. Josh Talks Malayalam caters to the Malayalam speaking audience worldwide. It aims to inspire and motivate Malayalees by showcasing Malayalam motivation through the experiences of fellow Malayalis. Josh talks Malayalam brings to you the best Malayalam motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women‚Äôs rights, public policy, sports, entertainment, and social initiatives. With 9 languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the setbacks they face in their career and helping them discover their true calling in life.

snippet.title: Lehja | Abhi Dutt ft. Faisu & Jannat | Vikram M | Teaser | New Romantic Song 2021 | Blive Music
snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents official teaser of new upcoming  romantic song "Lehja" sung by Abhi Dutt Featuring Faisu & Jannat Zubair. The lyrics are penned by Azeem Shirazi and the music is directed by Vikram Montrose song directed by Rahul Shetty. This latest song is created by Mahesh Kukreja.

#Lehja #AbhiDutt #RomanticSong2021

Song - Lehja
Composer- Vikram Montrose
Singer - Abhi Dutt
Lyrics - Azeem Shirazi
Song Programmed and Arranged - Vikram Montrose

Lyrics
Ho lokan da tan kam hunda 
Khichniyan lattan jaat apnia sochan nu azaad rakhda
Kehda banda kithe tak karda stand time das dinda time ni lihaj rakhda,
Kam te kalam utte rakheya bharosa khan bhaini wala chez ki a lokan nu a dasna
Gal Sun Makhna , 
Ho Gal sun Makhna Jehra Painda Rakhna , Hove j Mukadran Da time chakna..
Chup nu taka k chaki firde kai feelingan 3-4 Bandeyan da veham chakna Hooooo

Ho gallan vicho kadeyan main tarak bada 
Pali baithe dilan vich harakh bada
Sochde a sale kar jaan gay cross
Hunda ghode te kateedan vich farak bada
Dogle kahaunde jehde karde kharabi a
Pith na takaiye roti jihna nal khadi a
Ho chokan nal hunde ni start mitra ginne chune yaran kol mitran di chabi aa
Hauli Hauli sikhlangay udana v kaka kehnde jamde tan panchi v udaar ni hunde
Haske j kehnde kive o star saab hater hunde a sale yaar ni hunde
Chad de nu dekh jaa k mari de ni chitte aise fame da ki fayda paije thuk k j chatna
Gal sun Makhna...

Ho likhan ale di kadon kadar pai
Geetan vich kali kali sadar pai 
Pith piche kehnde sala vaada geetkar kal ud di hoi kana vich khabar pai
Matlab kad banda gallon j nahi lahi da
Apna bnaun de lai kise da dhai da
Settle hoiye ja na bhavein hoiye mitra 
Pehlan vere bande da stand hona chahida
Bohta v dimag utte pai da ni zor gaane jine k likhe a ohi gaye jaan gay
Kala kala karna release mitra par pehlan bebe bapu nu sunaye jaan gay
Apne valon tan pure likha tun tun change maade ch farak par lokan ne a dasna 
Gal sun Makhna..

snippet.title: Shabe Baraat Kalam - Jaga Ji Lagane ki Dunya Nahi Hai - Hafiz Tahir Qadri 2021
snippet.description:
This video specially published on the blessed occasion of Shabe Baraat.

This video is sponsored by Bin Hashim Pharmacy & Supermarket.
For details please visit : https://binhashimonline.pk/
Facebook page : https://www.facebook.com/binhashim.supermarket/

Artist: Hafiz Tahir Qadri
Audio : @R W D S 
Video: @Ajwa Production 
Edit by : Qazi Shaheer

Lyrics:

Tu Khushi ky phul ly gaa kb talak
Tu yahan zinda rhy gaa kb talak
1 din mRNA ha akhir moot ha
KR ly Jo krna hai akhir moot ha

Jagaji lagany ki duniya nahi ha
Ya ibrat ki jaan ha tamasha nahi ha

Jahan main hai ibrat ky har su namuny 
Magar tujh ko andha kia raang o buu ny...
Kbhi gour sy ye bhi dakha ha tu ny
Jo abad thy wo mehal ab Hain Sony

Jagaji lagany ki duniya nahi ha
Ye ibrat ki jaan ha tamasha nahi ha

Mily khak main ahl e shaan kesy kesy 
Makeen ho gay laa makan kesy kesy 
Huwy naamwar ny nishaan kesy kesy 
Zameen kha gae noo jawan kesy kesy??
Yahi tujh ko dhun ha rahu San sy ala 
Ho zinat nirali ho fashion nirala
Jiya krta ha Kya yuhi mrny wala??
Tujy Husn e Zahir ny dhoky main dala 

Jagaji lagany ki duniya nahi ha
Ye ibrat ki jaan ha tamasha nahi ha
Qabar main mayat utarni ha zarur 

Jesi krni wesi bhrni ha zrur 
Dabdaba duniya main hi rah jay gaa 
Hussan tera khak main mill jay ga 
Bey namazi Teri shamat aye gii 
Qabar ki diwar mill hi Jay gii 
Toor Dy gi Qabar Teri pasliyan
Dono haton ki Mily Jo ungliyan
Landon or Pairas ky sapny chor Dy
Bsss Madiny sy hi rishty joor ly
Bey Wafa duniya py mt kar aitabar 
Tu achanak moot ka ho gaa shikar 
KR ly Toba Rab ÿπÿ≤Ÿàÿ¨ŸÑ ki rehmat ha Bari
Qabar main wrna saza ho gii Kari 

Tujy phly bachpan main barooo khilaya 
Jawani ny phir tujh ko majnu banaya 
Burhapy ny phir ahh!! Kya Kya sataya??
Ajal tera KR Dy gi bilkul safaya
Ajal ny naa chora kisra naa Dara 
Esi sy Sikandar sifataien bhi Hara
Har ak ha ky naa Kya Kya hasrat sadara 
Para rh gya sab yuhi thate Sara 

Jagaji lagany ki duniya nahi ha
Ye ibrat ki jaan ha tamasha nahi ha

Notice:

snippet.title: Little progress made in freeing massive ship stuck in Suez Canal
snippet.description:
The Ever Given, the massive ship stuck in the Suez Canal, is still not freed and may not be for weeks even as crews work around the clock to free it. Elizabeth Palmer has more.

Holi par ek aur dhamaal, Pawan Singh ke Babuni Tere Rang Mein ke Holi Remix ke sath! Aaj hi suniyein Babuni - Holi Remix by DJ Kiran Kamath, banaiye apni party ko 'aur thoda young' aur khud bann jaiye 56Inch Dabangg!
 
Channel subscribe kijiye, apna pyaar dijiye and let's celebrate #Holi2021 in the power-star-Pawan Singh style! ‚ú® Subscribe now for more music every week!

Remix by DJ Kiran Kamath
Video edit by Black Acid Production

üéß Listen to & download 'Babuni Tere Rang Mein' on:

Wynk: https://wynk.in/music/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein/or_196006272005_ING642100271

JioSaavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein/Rx8cfExHY34

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/2sPqQdQ2rJZtTdhcymBZSD?si=vWcI_Uj6RdK9nH_TKX_c_A

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein

Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJN3Jk64/

Hungama: https://www.hungama.com/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein/63302712/

Amazon Prime Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08YDCVW7H?trackAsin=B08YDDZ4P7&ref=dm_sh_IQcfo2LLvB4GEnQac1ImmRrLZ

Vodafone Customers Dial 53712379375
Idea Customers Dial 53712379375
BSNL Customers Dial 5678912379375

Distributed by Global Music Junction

Managed by : Nirav Thakar, Radhika Mistry
Digital Strategy : Shivansh Jindal
Album Creatives : Dishant Mistry
PR : Lily Ahluwalia

Lyrics -

Rango ki katori hun
Tongue se chatori hun
Chahun mai colorful piya

Chahat ki tarango mein
Doobi hun mai rango mein
Pink pink mora jiya

Geeli geeli si
Geeli geeli meri dhaar
Aaja dekh le fuhaar
Pichkaari nahi ye
Tere love ka shikaar

Babuni tere rang mein
Babuni tere rang mein
Mai aur thoda young ho gyaa
Mai bhola bhaala lalla
Chappan inch dabangg ho gaya
Babuni tere rang me
Mai aur thoda young ho gaya

Antra

Kulhad mein whisky
Toh saiyaan ji hai risky
Kulhad mein whisky
Toh saiyaan ji hai risky
Maare ignore
Mai deewani hui jiski

Peeli peeli hai.. Haaye
Peeli peeli maine chaar
Ki hairaan thekedaar
Mujhko majnu banaake
De de laila waala pyaar

Babuni tere rang me
Mai aur thoda young ho gaya
Kheenchein jaise chumbak emotion tera
Babuni tere rang me
Chappan inch dabangg ho gaya
Naam saare jille me roshan tera

Babuni tere rang mein,
Mai aur thoda.. ho gaya!

snippet.title: The Suicide Squad - Official Red Band Hindi Trailer
snippet.description:
From writer/director James Gunn comes Warner Bros. Pictures‚Äô superhero action adventure ‚ÄúThe Suicide Squad,‚Äù featuring a collection of the most degenerate delinquents in the DC lineup. Watch the Official Red Band Hindi Trailer now.

Website: www.warnerbros-india.com
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/WarnerBrosIndia‚Äã
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/warnerbrosindia
Twitter: https://twitter.com/warnerbrosindia

Welcome to hell‚Äîa.k.a. Belle Reve, the prison with the highest mortality rate in the US of A.  Where the worst Super-Villains are kept and where they will do anything to get out‚Äîeven join the super-secret, super-shady Task Force X.  Today‚Äôs do-or-die assignment?  Assemble a collection of cons, including Bloodsport, Peacemaker, Captain Boomerang, Ratcatcher 2, Savant, King Shark, Blackguard, Javelin and everyone‚Äôs favorite psycho, Harley Quinn.  Then arm them heavily and drop them (literally) on the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Trekking through a jungle teeming with militant adversaries and guerrilla forces at every turn, the Squad is on a search-and-destroy mission with only Colonel Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave‚Ä¶and Amanda Waller‚Äôs government techies in their ears, tracking their every movement.  And as always, one wrong move and they‚Äôre dead (whether at the hands of their opponents, a teammate, or Waller herself).  If anyone‚Äôs laying down bets, the smart money is against them‚Äîall of them. 

The film stars Margot Robbie (‚ÄúBirds of Prey,‚Äù ‚ÄúBombshell‚Äù), Idris Elba (‚ÄúAvengers: Infinity War‚Äù), John Cena (upcoming HBO Max series ‚ÄúPeacemaker,‚Äù ‚ÄúBumblebee‚Äù), Joel Kinnaman (‚ÄúSuicide Squad‚Äù), Jai Courtney (the ‚ÄúDivergent‚Äù franchise), Peter Capaldi (‚ÄúWorld War Z,‚Äù BBC‚Äôs ‚ÄúDoctor Who‚Äù ), David Dastmalchian (upcoming ‚ÄúDune,‚Äù ‚ÄúAnt-Man and the Wasp‚Äù), Daniela Melchior (‚ÄúParque Mayer‚Äù), Michael Rooker (the ‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy‚Äù films), Alice Braga (‚ÄúElysium‚Äù), Pete Davidson (‚ÄúThe King of Staten Island,‚Äù TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúSaturday Night Live‚Äù), Joaqu√≠n Cosio (‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse,‚Äù TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúNarcos: Mexico‚Äù), Juan Diego Botto (‚ÄúThe Europeans‚Äù), Storm Reid (‚ÄúThe Invisible Man,‚Äù ‚ÄúA Wrinkle in Time‚Äù, ‚ÄúEuphoria‚Äù), Nathan Fillion (‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy,‚Äù TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúThe Rookie‚Äù), Steve Agee (‚ÄúBrightburn,‚Äù ‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2‚Äù), Sean Gunn (the ‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy‚Äù films, the ‚ÄúAvengers‚Äù films), Mayling Ng (‚ÄúWonder Woman‚Äù), Flula Borg (‚ÄúRalph Breaks the Internet‚Äù), Jennifer Holland (‚ÄúBrightburn,‚Äù upcoming HBO Max series ‚ÄúPeacemaker‚Äù) and Tinashe Kajese (TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúValor,‚Äù ‚ÄúThe Inspectors‚Äù), with Sylvester Stallone (the ‚ÄúRocky,‚Äù ‚ÄúRambo‚Äù and ‚ÄúExpendables‚Äù franchises), and Viola Davis (‚ÄúMa Rainey‚Äôs Black Bottom,‚Äù ‚ÄúSuicide Squad‚Äù).

Gunn (the ‚ÄúGuardian of the Galaxy‚Äù films) directs from his own screenplay, based on characters from DC.  The film is produced by Charles Roven and Peter Safran, with Zack Snyder, Deborah Snyder, Walter Hamada, Chantal Nong Vo, Nikolas Korda and Richard Suckle executive producing.

Gunn‚Äôs creative team includes director of photography Henry Braham (‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2‚Äù), production designer Beth Mickle (‚ÄúCaptain Marvel‚Äù), editors Fred Raskin (‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2,‚Äù ‚ÄúOnce Upon a Time‚Ä¶ In Hollywood‚Äù) and Christian Wagner (the ‚ÄúFast & Furious‚Äù films) and Oscar-nominated costume designer Judianna Makovsky (‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy Vol 2,‚Äù ‚ÄúAvengers: Endgame,‚Äù ‚ÄúHarry Potter and the Sorcerer‚Äôs Stone‚Äù).  The music is by John Murphy (‚ÄúKick-Ass‚Äù).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents An Atlas Entertainment/Peter Safran Production, A James Gunn Film, ‚ÄúThe Suicide Squad.‚Äù  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It is set for release in cinemas in India in August 2021.

localized.title: The Suicide Squad - Official Red Band Hindi Trailer
localized.description:
From writer/director James Gunn comes Warner Bros. Pictures‚Äô superhero action adventure ‚ÄúThe Suicide Squad,‚Äù featuring a collection of the most degenerate delinquents in the DC lineup. Watch the Official Red Band Hindi Trailer now.

Website: www.warnerbros-india.com
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/WarnerBrosIndia‚Äã
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/warnerbrosindia
Twitter: https://twitter.com/warnerbrosindia

Welcome to hell‚Äîa.k.a. Belle Reve, the prison with the highest mortality rate in the US of A.  Where the worst Super-Villains are kept and where they will do anything to get out‚Äîeven join the super-secret, super-shady Task Force X.  Today‚Äôs do-or-die assignment? Then arm them heavily and drop them (literally) on the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Born and raised in Shornur, Neeha Riyaz is a YouTuber and Influencer. Neeha's brilliant beginnings in areas such as modeling did not have a comfortable start. Neeha, the daughter of a businessman, had a comfortable childhood, but later became miserable at home after her father‚Äôs business collapsed. Neeha's family went through many hardships at this time. By the end of her school days, Neeha began to love the fashion industry a lot and to walk in style. Neeha lived within her own limits in the face of her family's financial situation. While still in college, Neeha  made her Instagram account public and started posting videos. But conservative relatives and locals began to approach Neeha's family with harsh criticism and complaints. Neeha, who was even called an 'Azhinjattakkari', kept going despite it. Today, while Neeha Riyaz is emerging as an influencer and YouTuber with the support of lakhs of people, the heads of her critics are held down.

Do not be misled by criticism and ridicule, for we have great things to do on this earth. Do not forget that all those who criticized you that day will one day bow their heads before you. If you found this episode by Josh Talks Malayalam helpful, please like and share it immediately; Let us know your comments via the comment box.

Josh Talks passionately believes that a well-told story has the power to reshape attitudes, lives, and ultimately, the world. We are on a mission to find and showcase the best motivational stories from across India through documented videos and live events held all over the country. Josh Talks Malayalam caters to the Malayalam speaking audience worldwide. Josh talks Malayalam brings to you the best Malayalam motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women‚Äôs rights, public policy, sports, entertainment, and social initiatives. With 9 languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the setbacks they face in their career and helping them discover their true calling in life.

Born and raised in Shornur, Neeha Riyaz is a YouTuber and Influencer. Neeha's brilliant beginnings in areas such as modeling did not have a comfortable start. Neeha, the daughter of a businessman, had a comfortable childhood, but later became miserable at home after her father‚Äôs business collapsed. Neeha's family went through many hardships at this time. By the end of her school days, Neeha began to love the fashion industry a lot and to walk in style. Neeha lived within her own limits in the face of her family's financial situation. While still in college, Neeha  made her Instagram account public and started posting videos. But conservative relatives and locals began to approach Neeha's family with harsh criticism and complaints. Neeha, who was even called an 'Azhinjattakkari', kept going despite it. Today, while Neeha Riyaz is emerging as an influencer and YouTuber with the support of lakhs of people, the heads of her critics are held down.

Do not be misled by criticism and ridicule, for we have great things to do on this earth. Do not forget that all those who criticized you that day will one day bow their heads before you. If you found this episode by Josh Talks Malayalam helpful, please like and share it immediately; Let us know your comments via the comment box.

Watch Neeha Riyaz's YouTube channel here:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCR_wsbbj-0ZUMKDDmfPJC-w


Josh Talks passionately believes that a well-told story has the power to reshape attitudes, lives, and ultimately, the world. We are on a mission to find and showcase the best motivational stories from across India through documented videos and live events held all over the country. Josh Talks Malayalam caters to the Malayalam speaking audience worldwide. Josh talks Malayalam brings to you the best Malayalam motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women‚Äôs rights, public policy, sports, entertainment, and social initiatives. With 9 languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the setbacks they face in their career and helping them discover their true calling in life.

snippet.title: PM Modi receives ceremonial welcome in Dhaka, Bangladesh
snippet.description:
Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi arrived in Dhaka for his visit to Bangladesh at the invitation of Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina. This is the historic visit to celebrate Mujib Borsho- the birth centenary of Sheikh Mujibur Rahman ; 50 years of the establishment of diplomatic ties between India and Bangladesh; and 50 years of Bangladesh‚Äôs war of liberation. In a special gesture, Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina and Ministers from her cabinet welcomed Prime Minister Modi at the Hazrat Shahjalal International Airport. A salute of 19 guns and Guard of honour were accorded to Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi.

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 08 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 26th March 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 08 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 26th March 21

Hit the bell and subscribe to stay connected with Har Pal Geo's collection of Pakistani dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family‚Äôs class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad‚Äôs efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi‚Äôs heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher

Composer: Naveed Nashad

snippet.title: Maritime traffic jam: Ship blocking Suez Canal could take weeks to dislodge
snippet.description:
Experts troubleshoot to try and speed up dislodging the cargo ship blocking the Suez Canal and causing a maritime traffic jam.

Some companies are being forced to travel alternative routes taking on additional time and costing thousands of pounds.

Diggers are currently trying to excavate the bow of the ship while tugboats are attempting to pull and push the boat free.

Sky's Helen-Ann Smith reports.

Episode 3131: Can Jethalal Lift The Cylinder?
---------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal returns to Gokuldham Society with a gift-wrapped mixture for Babita. But Babita seems tense. When Jetha asks her the reason for her tension, she reveals that the gas in her cylinder is over and now she can't cook her food. Jethalal being Jethalal tells her not to worry as he goes to his house to get the gas cylinder from his kitchen. Once there, he finds out that the cylinder is heavy and that it is next to impossible to lift it. Watch the full episode now.


More Useful Links :

Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3131: Can Jethalal Lift The Cylinder?
---------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal returns to Gokuldham Society with a gift-wrapped mixture for Babita. But Babita seems tense. When Jetha asks her the reason for her tension, she reveals that the gas in her cylinder is over and now she can't cook her food. Jethalal being Jethalal tells her not to worry as he goes to his house to get the gas cylinder from his kitchen. Once there, he finds out that the cylinder is heavy and that it is next to impossible to lift it. Watch the full episode now.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 26 March 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara‚Äôs birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can‚Äôt tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: Clash Royale Update: MAGIC ITEMS ARE COMING! (New Animation)
snippet.description:
**NEW UPDATE COMING SOON**
Get Ready to Upgrade Your Cards Faster with Magic Items!
Watch the Magic Items TV Royale: https://youtu.be/7rQvfqoLnmw

Subscribe for more! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ http://supr.cl/SubRoyale

Enter the Arena! From the creators of Clash of Clans comes a real-time multiplayer game starring the Royales, your favorite Clash characters and much, much more.

Collect and upgrade dozens of cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defenses you know and love, as well as the Royales: Princes, Knights, Baby Dragons and more. Knock the enemy King and Princesses from their towers to defeat your opponents and win Trophies, Crowns and glory in the Arena. Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community.

Lead the Clash Royale Family to victory!

FEATURES
‚Ä¢ Duel players from around the world in real-time in both 1v1 and 2v2 Battles
‚Ä¢ Earn chests to unlock rewards, collect powerful new cards and upgrade existing ones
‚Ä¢ Destroy opponent's towers and win Crowns to earn epic Crown chests
‚Ä¢ Build and upgrade your card collection with the Clash Royale Family along with dozens of your favorite Clash troops, spells and defenses
‚Ä¢ Construct your ultimate Battle Deck to defeat your opponents
‚Ä¢ Progress through multiple Arenas all the way to the top
‚Ä¢ Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community
‚Ä¢ Challenge your Clanmates and friends to a private duel, or play side-by-side in a 2v2 Battle
‚Ä¢ Work together with your Clan to unlock Clan Chests
‚Ä¢ Play new events every week
‚Ä¢ Learn different battle tactics by watching the best duels on TV Royale

PLEASE NOTE! Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash Royale. A network connection is also required.

Support:
Are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clash-royale/ or contact us in-game by going to Settings, Help and support.

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

en.title: Clash Royale Update: MAGIC ITEMS ARE COMING! (New Animation)
en.description:
**NEW UPDATE COMING SOON**
Get Ready to Upgrade Your Cards Faster with Magic Items!
Watch the Magic Items TV Royale: https://youtu.be/7rQvfqoLnmw

Subscribe for more! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ http://supr.cl/SubRoyale

Enter the Arena! From the creators of Clash of Clans comes a real-time multiplayer game starring the Royales, your favorite Clash characters and much, much more.

Collect and upgrade dozens of cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defenses you know and love, as well as the Royales: Princes, Knights, Baby Dragons and more. Knock the enemy King and Princesses from their towers to defeat your opponents and win Trophies, Crowns and glory in the Arena. Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community.

Lead the Clash Royale Family to victory!

FEATURES
‚Ä¢ Duel players from around the world in real-time in both 1v1 and 2v2 Battles
‚Ä¢ Earn chests to unlock rewards, collect powerful new cards and upgrade existing ones
‚Ä¢ Destroy opponent's towers and win Crowns to earn epic Crown chests
‚Ä¢ Build and upgrade your card collection with the Clash Royale Family along with dozens of your favorite Clash troops, spells and defenses
‚Ä¢ Construct your ultimate Battle Deck to defeat your opponents
‚Ä¢ Progress through multiple Arenas all the way to the top
‚Ä¢ Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community
‚Ä¢ Challenge your Clanmates and friends to a private duel, or play side-by-side in a 2v2 Battle
‚Ä¢ Work together with your Clan to unlock Clan Chests
‚Ä¢ Play new events every week
‚Ä¢ Learn different battle tactics by watching the best duels on TV Royale

PLEASE NOTE! Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash Royale. A network connection is also required.

Support:
Are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clash-royale/ or contact us in-game by going to Settings, Help and support.

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi
